task: Black Queen on D5 is threatening a White piece! Tap it!
hint: Black Queen on D5 can move to D2.
explanation: Queen on D5 threatens the White Queen on D2!

task: Black Bishop on F5 threatens a White piece! Tap it!
explanation: Bishop on F5 threatens Rook on D3!

task: Black Knight on C3 can fork! Which White piece is threatened?
hint: From C3, Knight can jump to D1.
explanation: Knight from C3 jumps to D1 — a fork!

task: Black Rook on D4 threatens a White piece! Tap it!
hint: Rook can slide down the D-file.
explanation: Black Rook threatens White Rook on D2!

task: Black Bishop on E4 eyes a White piece! Tap it!
explanation: Bishop on E4 threatens Rook on H1!
